Home › Services › GST Return Filing

GST Return Filing in Mumbai

GST return filing is the periodic reporting of sales, purchases, and tax to the GST department. We prepare and file GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, and annual returns for businesses in Mumbai, and reconcile input tax credit.

Regular taxpayers file GSTR-1 (outward supplies) and GSTR-3B (summary and payment), monthly or quarterly under the QRMP scheme, plus the annual return GSTR-9 where applicable — as per the CGST Act, 2017 and CBIC rules.

What is the process?

  1. Reconcile sales, purchases, and input tax credit (GSTR-2B).
  2. Prepare and file GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B for the period.
  3. Compute and arrange GST payment, if any.
  4. File annual return (GSTR-9) and reconciliation where required.

What documents are required?

  • Sales and purchase registers
  • Issued tax invoices and credit/debit notes
  • Purchase invoices for input tax credit
  • GST login credentials
  • Bank statements for the period
Typical timelineReturns are filed within each statutory cycle; we agree a recurring schedule so deadlines are never missed.
FeesFees depend on transaction volume and frequency. Contact us for a quote.

Source: CGST Act, 2017 and CBIC — gst.gov.in. Due dates can change by notification; we confirm current dates each cycle.

Request a quote

Frequently asked questions

What is the GSTR-3B due date?
GSTR-3B is generally due by the 20th of the following month for monthly filers (staggered dates apply for QRMP/quarterly filers), as per CBIC notifications. We confirm the exact date for your registration.
What is the difference between GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B?
GSTR-1 reports the details of outward supplies (sales), while GSTR-3B is a summary return through which tax is paid. Both are filed by regular taxpayers.
What is the QRMP scheme?
QRMP lets small taxpayers (turnover up to the prescribed limit) file GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B quarterly while paying tax monthly.
